title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
summary_full: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.
summary_public: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran exchange strikes across Middle East
